/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libaurora_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libaurora_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/aurora_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/aurora_msgs/msg/detail/object3_d__description.c.o CMakeFiles/aurora_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/aurora_msgs/msg/detail/object3_d__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/aurora_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/aurora_msgs/msg/detail/object3_d__type_support.c.o CMakeFiles/aurora_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/aurora_msgs/msg/detail/object3_d_array__description.c.o CMakeFiles/aurora_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/aurora_msgs/msg/detail/object3_d_array__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/aurora_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/aurora_msgs/msg/detail/object3_d_array__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl
